title: Youtube video of Kaworu and Eva 04 again
display_title: Youtube video of Kaworu and Eva 04 again
wikitext:
[]: Youtube video of Kaworu and Eva-04 (again) Post by KLVTZ » Thu Aug 05, 2010 5:27 pm So there's this video on youtube [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4Ia4nyGITAc[/url] that shows Kaworu fighting Ramiel, the video's been swamp with spanish people, claiming it was a sneak peek to eva 3.0 Q movie, Obviously its a game, but whats interesting is how kaworu is used to fight, and just his power to destroy an angel is amazing, thought this would be a good, share, BTW if anyone wants to translate the spanish that pops up, feel free to, or the Japanese. This is not a Trailer, just a game. Enjoy & speculate.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Aug 05, 2010 5:30 pm http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=5952 Please use the thread search feature next time.
